subtitle: GovCon Technology Director -- PMO Governance | ERP Implementation | Consulting Delivery
summary_text: Technology executive with 14 years leading enterprise-wide programs in regulated environments, including contact center platform transformation, ERP/CRM product ownership, and full SDLC governance modernization. Founded and ran a technology consulting firm for 17 years, managing client delivery, project teams, and billable engagements end-to-end. Built MMI's Enterprise PMO from scratch, achieving a 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a 45-50 person delivery organization. Currently consults on enterprise AI adoption and technology architecture evaluation for a national CX consulting firm. Brings structured methodology, client service discipline, and teams-of-teams leadership to complex technology implementation engagements.

bullets: Deliver specialized technology consulting on enterprise AI architecture evaluation; designed a structured scoring rubric and evaluation framework adopted by a national CX consulting firm for platform selection and vendor assessment.
Provide solution architecture leadership and pre-sales technical expertise to support AI platform evaluation, vendor selection, and execution decisions for contact center environments.
Enable executive stakeholders to assess architectural trade-offs and make informed technology adoption decisions aligned with enterprise strategy and budget.
Led a technology organization of 35+ direct staff (75+ including extended and vendor teams) with annual operating budgets exceeding $15M; reported to CEO for final eight years of tenure.

Built MMI's Enterprise PMO from scratch -- scope, governance, methodology, and measurement; pulled non-IT projects into the IT-led framework and achieved a 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across the portfolio.

Owned eight-year product roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM platform across a 45-50 person delivery org (BA, QA, software development); operated a multi-factor prioritization model governing sprint-over-sprint decisions across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders.

Led full enterprise contact center platform transformation -- directed solution design, multi-channel integration, risk-managed migration, and zero-disruption go-live across distributed national operations.
Modernized SDLC governance through SAFe Agile transformation (10-week to 2-week sprints), doubling development throughput and reducing concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% year-over-year.
Maintained 100% audited PCI-DSS certification over multiple years; managed compliance with HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, and 50-state regulatory requirements with consistently low audit finding frequency.
Founded and scaled a technology consulting firm over 17 years with full P&L ownership -- finance, HR, talent, client delivery, partnerships, and operations.
Managed end-to-end consulting engagements: client acquisition, proposal development, project delivery, and account management across a diverse client base.

Architected and launched a proprietary, commercial-grade CMS platform serving dozens of content-driven clients; built and scaled multiple independent revenue streams including web hosting and custom application development.

projects.title: AI Architecture Evaluation Framework
projects.desc: Designed scoring rubric, evaluation flow, and capability taxonomy for comparing AI architectures across enterprise contact center platforms. Adopted by a national CX consulting firm. github.com/mknnmknn/career-ops-dml
projects.tech: AI Architecture, Platform Evaluation, Enterprise AI

skills.items: PMO Governance, SDLC Methodology, Agile/SAFe, Project Lifecycle Management, Engagement Management
ERP/CRM (Homegrown Platform), Contact Center Platforms, Azure DevOps, ServiceNow, JIRA
DataRobot (Production ML), PowerBI, Tableau, SQL Server, SQL/T-SQL
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, GRC Programs, Multi-State Regulatory Compliance
Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Platform Evaluation, LLM Architecture
